diagrams.title: CIA Triad Components
diagrams.description: Shows the three core pillars of information security and their相互关系
diagrams.purpose: Understanding fundamental security principles and their interdependence in protecting information assets.

diagrams.title: Security Attack Lifecycle
diagrams.description: Illustrates the five phases an attacker follows during a security breach
diagrams.purpose: Helps security professionals anticipate and defend against attacks at each stage.

diagrams.title: Types of Network Attacks Classification
diagrams.description: Categorizes attacks into passive vs active and their subtypes
diagrams.purpose: Understanding attack categories helps in selecting appropriate defense mechanisms.

diagrams.title: Security Controls Framework

diagrams.purpose: Implementing layered security through appropriate combination of controls.
